_exempt: <!-- PRIMARY-SOURCE-EXEMPT: reason=exact-integer witness of the self-pumped conjugator (Feinberg 1982 / Cronin-Golomb 1984) in the QA additive group; same-medium recovery = qa_neg(s), pump-independent. -->
primary_source: (Feinberg, 1982) DOI 10.1364/OL.7.000486; (Cronin-Golomb et al., 1984) DOI 10.1109/JQE.1984.1072018. Self-pumped conjugate of s=5 (any self-pump) = qa_neg(5)=19; same-medium return recovers 19.
